articles.title: BYD Stock News Today | Earnings, Events & Price Alerts
articles.summary: This page provides a comprehensive overview of news and events related to BYD stock, encompassing financial updates, relevant news articles, and corporate events. It highlights recent Tesla delivery shortfalls, an electric vehicle demand surge due to the Middle East crisis, and several significant events for Boyd Gaming, including the sale of a hotel and casino property.

articles.title: Gavin Newsom Hails Apple's '50 Years Of Innovation' As Tesla, Chevron, McKesson Leave California
articles.summary: Governor Gavin Newsom praised Apple Inc. on its 50th anniversary, highlighting its innovation while acknowledging that other major corporations like Tesla, Chevron, and McKesson have left California. These companies cited high operating costs, strict regulations, and the pursuit of more business-friendly environments in other states as reasons for their relocation. The article points to a growing tension between California's legacy of innovation and its current business climate, with several tech figures also scaling back their presence in the state.

articles.title: GLJ Maintains Sell Rating on Tesla (TSLA)
articles.summary: GLJ Research has maintained its Sell rating on Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) with a price target of $24.86, despite forecasting Q1 2026 deliveries higher than Wall Street consensus. Analyst Gordon Johnson believes the expected growth is not from organic demand but rather from margin-dilutive subsidy arbitrage and a weak comparison base, noting a significant decline from peak quarterly deliveries. Tesla, a prominent electric vehicle and clean energy company, faces scrutiny regarding its growth drivers.

articles.title: Tesla Posts 8% US Sales Drop in March as Model S and Model X Bow Out
articles.summary: Tesla's US vehicle sales declined by 7.9% in March to 41,300 units, marking the sixth consecutive monthly year-over-year drop. Total quarterly sales were down 12.5% to 119,900 units. The company is shifting focus towards autonomy-related projects and phasing out the Model S and Model X, which account for a small percentage of deliveries, while facing increased scrutiny on its Full Self-Driving software and recent executive departures.

articles.title: Ford CEO Says They'll Have an Affordable EV To Compete With The Model Y/3, And There's Nothing Else Like It on the Market
articles.summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley confirmed that a secret "skunkworks" team, comprising former Tesla and Formula One engineers, is developing an affordable electric vehicle set to launch in 2027. This new EV is designed to directly compete with Tesla's Model Y and Model 3, utilizing a radically different Universal EV Platform with advanced manufacturing and software. While Ford aims for a $30,000 price point and 300 miles of range, the article notes skepticism regarding Ford's ability to deliver on time and compete with Tesla's lead in software and autonomy by 2027.

articles.title: Tesla sales in Portugal fall 1.7% in March
articles.summary: Tesla's new car registrations in Portugal decreased by 1.7% in March compared to the previous year, totaling 1,189 units. This decline occurred despite an overall 24% increase in fully-electric car sales in the country during the same period. However, for the January-March quarter, Tesla's sales in Portugal saw a significant rise of 27.1%, reaching 2,726 vehicles, aligning with the broader growth in electric vehicle sales.

articles.title: Tesla’s Path to $1,000 Per Share Runs Through the Autonomous Vehicle Boom
articles.summary: Tesla's path to a $1,000 per share valuation hinges on the success of its autonomous vehicle initiatives, including the Cybercab and robotaxi scaling. Despite a recent stock decline of 17.34% year-to-date and challenges like lower Q4 vehicle deliveries and reduced net income in 2025, the company projects significant growth from its robotaxi ventures and Optimus robot production. Wall Street analysts remain cautious, but the bull case emphasizes the potential for dramatic earnings growth from these new segments to justify such a valuation.
